projects.name: Intent Signal System
projects.description: Job posting monitor, competitor reverse engineering, news/funding alerts, and CEIPAL contractor end date alerts for 20+ target accounts. Feeds daily brief to Julia's BDM team.

projects.name: Diversity Supplier Outreach Campaign
projects.description: Email campaign targeting Seattle companies with supplier diversity programs. 26 verified contacts via Apollo. Blocked: waiting on email credentials (Liz or miked@rylem.com) per Mike's hold on 3/16.

projects.name: Julia Dormant Account Reactivation
projects.description: Reactivating 12 dormant clients from Julia's 28-account history. All companies added to intent signal monitoring. Cross-referencing signals to prioritize outreach.

projects.name: Leadership L10 Scorecard Automation
projects.description: Automating weekly L10 scorecard from CEIPAL + QuickBooks data. Covers placements YTD, contractor count, revenue vs $7M goal, margin per recruiter, jobs by BDM, AR aging. Currently producing for Monday 3 PM leadership meetings.

projects.name: LLM Visibility & Content Strategy
projects.description: Comprehensive strategy for AI/LLM discoverability: SEO blog posts, LinkedIn thought leadership (5x daily), structured content for ChatGPT visibility. Anchored on AI staffing + finance + GDM positioning. Replaces earlier 5x daily content plan.

projects.name: CFO GDM Controller Outreach Campaign
projects.description: Marketing email campaign targeting CFOs/VP Finance at mid-market companies. Angle: contract controllers via GDM at 40-60% cost savings. Next: build Apollo target list and 3-email follow-up sequence.

projects.name: GitHub Website Rebuild
projects.description: Full redo of dadesmike-design.github.io/rylem-site/ — match rylem.com Wix site nav and copy exactly. VMS removed, diversity reduced. Pulling 7 real Wix blog posts for insights page. Nav structure + real copy still pending.

projects.name: Rylem Data Asset Dashboard
projects.description: Valuation-focused dashboard showing company metrics: $4.2M annualized revenue, 63.1% gross margin, 43 active contractors, 270K candidate database, client concentration. Built to support acquisition inquiries and data moat strategy.

projects.name: Pipeline Management System
projects.description: Build pipeline stages, activity-to-outcome ratios, account scoring, and weekly BDM accountability from AOP_2026.xlsx (2,959 contacts). 46% never contacted, only 1 meeting booked in 2026. Feeds into L10 process.

projects.name: HubSpot CRM Setup
projects.description: HubSpot account created (portal 245548372). Blocked: free tier maxed at 942/1,000 contacts, AOP has 2,959. Waiting on Mike's decision — upgrade $20/mo, load top 998, or build custom in Mission Control.

projects.name: CEIPAL BI Report Integration
projects.description: Pull L10 data from CEIPAL BI Reports (Meetings Completed, Meetings Set, Rec Leads) via browser automation. Integrates into L10 scorecard automation to fill remaining blank fields.

projects.name: RingCentral Call Review System
projects.description: AI reviews RingCentral call recordings against recruiter call flow scripts, scores performance, flags red flags. 202 recordings available. Nightly batch reviews running but rate-limited.

projects.name: CareerBuilder Integration
projects.description: Successfully logged into CareerBuilder employer portal (liza@rylem.com). Resume database search active with 300 actions/day quota. Used for candidate sourcing on Jobs 19718 and 19719.

projects.name: TrueBlue Reactivation & GDM Pitch
projects.description: Julia to call TrueBlue contact with GDM pitch. Company in cost-cutting mode ($32M net loss Q4). GDM = offshore talent at 40-60% savings. 105 historical placements. Waiting for Mike's go-ahead to build pitch deck.

projects.name: Recruiting Feedback Knowledge Base
projects.description: Built from Liza's sourcing feedback. Contains location rules, experience validation criteria, FTE-to-contract risk flags, recruiter specialty matching, and per-candidate verdicts. Improves future candidate sourcing quality.
